labels.analysis: The MCP Server "xyz.actiongate.api/actiongate" provides 3 tools for development tools tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Development Tools" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.

tools.name: risk_score
tools.title: Risk Score
tools.description: Score the risk of a proposed agent action before execution. Paid via x402.

request_id.description: Optional caller-supplied request identifier for tracing and receipts.

actor_id.description: Stable actor identifier for the agent or wallet operator.

wallet_address.description: Optional onchain wallet address associated with the acting agent.

actor.description: Actor metadata for the agent proposing the action.

action_type.description: The proposed action category, such as transfer, swap, or approve.

action.description: Action payload to evaluate. Additional action-specific fields are accepted as passthrough.

context.description: Optional execution context such as chain state, balances, or treasury metadata.

tools.name: simulate
tools.title: Simulate
tools.description: Estimate cost, failure risk, and notable side effects for a proposed action. Paid via x402.

request_id.description: Optional caller-supplied request identifier for tracing and receipts.

actor_id.description: Stable actor identifier for the agent or wallet operator.

wallet_address.description: Optional onchain wallet address associated with the acting agent.

actor.description: Actor metadata for the agent proposing the action.

action_type.description: The proposed action category, such as transfer, swap, or approve.

action.description: Action payload to evaluate. Additional action-specific fields are accepted as passthrough.

context.description: Optional execution context such as chain state, balances, or treasury metadata.

tools.name: policy_gate
tools.title: Policy Gate
tools.description: Apply treasury policy to a proposed action and return allow, deny, or allow-with-limits. Paid via x402.

request_id.description: Optional caller-supplied request identifier for tracing and receipts.

actor_id.description: Stable actor identifier for the agent or wallet operator.

wallet_address.description: Optional onchain wallet address associated with the acting agent.

actor.description: Actor metadata for the agent proposing the action.

action_type.description: The proposed action category, such as transfer, swap, or approve.

action.description: Action payload to evaluate. Additional action-specific fields are accepted as passthrough.

policy.description: Policy pack input, including policy_id and any policy-specific override values.

context.description: Optional execution context such as chain state, balances, or treasury metadata.
